title: hyptis radicans
intro: Hyptis radicans, also known as Wild Chrysanthemum, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Hyptis radicans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
